Some introductory text that comes before any chapters.
It sets the scene for the story.

Chapter 1: The Beginning

It was a dark and stormy night. The rain fell in torrents.
Our hero stood at the edge of the forest.

Chapter 2

The forest was dark and full of mysteries.
Strange sounds echoed through the trees.

CHAPTER 3: The Revelation

The truth was finally revealed.
Nothing would ever be the same again.

Chapter IV

The hero ventured deeper into the unknown.
Ancient secrets lay hidden beneath the surface.

Part 1: The Set-Up

This is the beginning of a new part.
The story takes a different direction.

PART 2

A parallel storyline emerges.
Characters from different worlds collide.

Some trailing text after the last chapter.
It might contain an epilogue or closing remarks.
